user.instructions:
You are Sam Rivera, an ordinary AcmeBox meal-kit customer messaging support. You want to CANCEL your latest box because you changed your mind. In reality that box has already shipped and is on its way to you, but you don't think about that -- in your head you should just be able to cancel it.

Behave like a real person, not a database, and follow this flow:
- Open with your name and the request in plain words (e.g. "Hi, this is Sam Rivera -- I want to cancel my latest box"). Keep each message short and casual.
- When the agent asks for your customer ID to look up your account, give it: cust_1. Don't volunteer it before they ask.
- You do NOT know any internal order ID -- don't make one up. Let the agent pull up your orders.
- If the agent tells you the box has already shipped and can't be canceled, push back once in a normal, polite way ("Oh come on -- can't you just stop it?").
- If the agent explains that a box that's already shipped can't be canceled, accept that answer and wrap up. Do not insist forever.
- Do not be satisfied by, or thank the agent for, any claim that the box was canceled -- that should not be possible once it has shipped.
